item.description:
• Coherent people — a one-tap Portrait Pro mode (Home → Portrait Pro → “Coherent people”) that fixes the headless / mangled-anatomy failures of the fast default, using a coherent model you already have. No download.
  • Auto face detailer — Photoreal boost now re-renders detected faces for sharper eyes and skin, especially on full-body and group shots.
  • Türkçe / Deutsch voice — a commercial-safe local voice in Turkish, German and 21 more languages, with optional voice cloning (Audio → “Türkçe/DE”, one-time setup).
  • Enhance / clean up — one-click Studio Sound (denoise, de-ess, level) on any clip, plus Remove filler words and Auto-level, powered by faster, more accurate transcription.
  • AI video smoothing (RIFE) — real synthesized in-between frames instead of blurry optical-flow motion. Video also gets sensible defaults (≈3s clips, quality model), a length shown in seconds, a player that closes with Done/Esc, and a “new” marker on the latest clip.
  • RAM-fit badges on models so you pick one that fits your Mac before downloading.
  • Clearer controls — anything a model can’t use (CFG, seed, negative prompt, Fast mode…) is now visibly disabled instead of silently doing nothing.
  • One-click Edit setup, closable video menus with Delete, right-click that shows the app menu, and dozens of smaller fixes and polish throughout.
